Off Calendar Dec-15-2015 Off Calendar

Notice Of Motion To Compel Discovery And Request For Sanctions
Off Calendar Nov-10-2015 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances: J. Philip Martin telephone number 415-794-1856 for Plaintiff.
Kevin Greenquist of Zanghi Torres Arshawsky LLP telephone number 415-977-0444 for Defendant.

The Parties stipulated to the Judge Pro Tem. The matter was argued. DEFENDANTS RINCON GREEN and EMERALD FUND INC.'S Motion To Compel Discovery is granted as to the deposition of Plaintiff Santos and denied as to written discovery. Counsel for the Plaintiff is to submit a proposed order.

Judge Pro Tem: Steven Stein. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Not reported. (302/JPT)

Notice Of Motion And Motion For Order To Compel Deposition And For Sanctions
Off Calendar Nov-20-2015 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES: Atty. J. PHILIP MARTIN, ESQ., Tel No. 415-794-1856 specially appearing for the Plaintiff;
Atty. KEVIN P. GREENQUIST, ESQ. of Zanghi Torres Arshawsky LLP, Tel No. 415-977-0444 appearing for the Defendants.

The Court's tentative ruling required parties to appear at hearing. Both sides stipulate to the matter being heard by the pro tem judge. Matter argued and submitted by counsel. The Court takes PLAINTIFF CHRISTOPHER SANTOS' Motion For Order To Compel Deposition And For Sanctions under submission. Judge Pro Tem: Sigrid Irias, Clerk: Sean Kane, Not Reported. (302/JPT)

No appearances in the matter. The Court adopts its tentative ruling as follows: DEFENDANTS RINCON GREEN, EMERALD FUND INC'S DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT is taken off Calendar as moot. Plaintiff filed an amended complaint March 25, 2015. Judge Ernest H. Goldsmith; Clerk Felicia Green; Dept. 302. (302/EHG)
